test_scenarios.given: aws_security_group_rule with ingress type and authorized TCP port 80 from 0.0.0.0/0
test_scenarios.then: the rule should PASS as port 80 is authorized

test_scenarios.given: aws_security_group_rule with ingress type and authorized TCP port 443 from ::/0
test_scenarios.then: the rule should PASS as port 443 is authorized

test_scenarios.given: aws_security_group_rule with ingress type and unauthorized TCP port 22 from 0.0.0.0/0
test_scenarios.then: the rule should FAIL as port 22 is not authorized

test_scenarios.given: aws_security_group_rule with ingress type and catch-all protocol from 0.0.0.0/0
test_scenarios.then: the rule should FAIL as catch-all protocols are not allowed with unrestricted access

test_scenarios.given: aws_security_group_rule with ingress type and restricted CIDR (not 0.0.0.0/0)
test_scenarios.then: the rule should PASS as it doesn't allow unrestricted access
the rule should PASS as only ingress rules are checked

test_scenarios.given: aws_security_group with inline ingress allowing authorized TCP ports 80-443 from 0.0.0.0/0
test_scenarios.when: the policy evaluates the security group
test_scenarios.then: the security group should PASS as all ports in range are authorized

test_scenarios.given: aws_security_group with inline ingress allowing unauthorized TCP port 3389 from 0.0.0.0/0
test_scenarios.when: the policy evaluates the security group
test_scenarios.then: the security group should FAIL as port 3389 is not authorized

test_scenarios.given: aws_security_group with inline ingress using catch-all protocol from ::/0
test_scenarios.when: the policy evaluates the security group
test_scenarios.then: the security group should FAIL as catch-all protocols are not allowed

test_scenarios.given: aws_security_group with inline ingress from restricted CIDR (not 0.0.0.0/0 or ::/0)
test_scenarios.when: the policy evaluates the security group
test_scenarios.then: the security group should PASS as it doesn't allow unrestricted access

test_scenarios.given: aws_vpc_security_group_ingress_rule with authorized TCP port 80 from 0.0.0.0/0
test_scenarios.then: the rule should PASS as port 80 is authorized

test_scenarios.given: aws_vpc_security_group_ingress_rule with unauthorized UDP port 53 from ::/0
test_scenarios.then: the rule should FAIL as UDP port 53 is not in authorized_udp_ports (empty by default)
the rule should FAIL as catch-all protocols are not allowed with unrestricted access
the rule should PASS as it doesn't allow unrestricted access
